limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

search.description: Optional. Fuzzy full-text search across `name` and `description`. Combines weighted Postgres full-text search (name weight A, description weight C, with prefix-as-you-type matching on the last token) with trigram similarity on `name` (handles typos and transpositions). Results are ordered by relevance score, then pinned status, then name. When omitted, dashboards are ordered by pinned status then alphabetical name.
